text:
is a mecha in the Godzilla vs Evangelion collaboration series. It is the Mechagodzilla Type 3 featured in the film '. It was introduced in the pachinko PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G.

Profile

See complete profile at Wikizilla, the kaiju encyclopedia.

History

PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G

After the first invasion of King Ghidorah is foiled by Godzilla and NERV team effort. NERV develops a new weapon in order to act as a safeguard against the mysterious actions of Godzilla: The Type 3 Kiryū (Mechagodzilla). 

However in a new invasion on Earth, now by the X Seijin, they revived Gigan, Radon, Biollante and Kaiser Ghidorah, creating chaos around various places in the world. As NERV fights each monster, they suffer a great loss when the Seijin X steals the Type 3 Kiryū and use it against NERV. https://youtu.be/ZSd-yrPh8mA?si=ZwrIOcDSj6kQjTCl 

Development

It was first featured in the game ' as part of the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration. Here, it was piloted by Asuka Shikinami Langley.

Trivia

This version was introduced in the 2002 film '.
